raw_title: Book Review: ‘Trudeau & Doonesbury,’ by Joshua Kendall
description: A new biography of Garry Trudeau tracks the rise of a comic strip that brought counterculture and political opinions to the funny pages.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘America, U.S.A.,’ by Eddie S. Glaude Jr.
book_title: ‘America, U.S.A.,’ by Eddie S. Glaude Jr.
description: In “America, U.S.A.,” Eddie Glaude Jr. looks back at the country’s past anniversaries with skepticism and pain.
